title: AppliedModification
description: An add-on or discount currently applied to a subscription, including the inherited or overridden values.

id.description: Identifier of the base add-on or discount definition.

amount.description: Amount applied per billing cycle as a decimal string.

never_expires.description: If true, this modification applies indefinitely.

number_of_billing_cycles.description: Number of billing cycles this modification will apply.

current_billing_cycle.description: The billing cycle on which this modification began.
